name: Volume by Sales Exec
description: Total sales volume grouped by Sales Executive (excludes Autocare brands).

name: Weekly Sales Volume
description: Sales volume split by week of the current month (excludes Autocare brands).

name: 'Activ' Customer Count
description: Unique customer count for Activ brand (excludes Activ Essential). Threshold: 0.9L.

name: 'Power1' Customer Count
description: Unique customer count for Power1 products (exact product match). Threshold: 5L.

name: 'Magnatec' Customer Count
description: Unique customer count for Magnatec / Magntec SUV / Magnatec Diesel. Threshold: 3.5L.

name: 'CRB Turbomax' Customer Count
description: Unique customer count for CRB Turbomax brand. Threshold: 1L. Has product-level drill-down.

name: High-Volume Customer Count
description: Customers with >= 9L of core products (excludes non-core products and Autocare brands).

name: Autocare Count
description: Unique customer count for Auto Care Exterior / Auto Care Maintenance brands. Threshold: 5L.

name: Volume by Brand
description: Total sales volume grouped by product brand name.

name: Top 10 Customers
description: Top 10 customers ranked by total invoice value (incl. VAT/GST).
